title: Implement manager property form parity backend contract
description: Expand manager property create/update endpoints to support richer field coverage and deterministic validation envelopes while preserving manager auth/session guardrails.
acceptance_criteria: Property create and update endpoints accept the enriched form contract required by native manager flows
Validation failures return deterministic field-level errors compatible with the mobile editor
Backend tests cover manager success, invalid payload, unauthorized, forbidden, and conflict envelopes
